creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ran into this issue when running the build with -j24 and -DWITH_ICONV

$ make -VMK_ICONV -f share/mk/bsd.own.mk 
yes


In file included from /usr/src/lib/libc/iconv/citrus_iconv.c:37:
